nodes.title: villain
nodes.body: Villain is loose-passive (VPIP 60%, PFR 16%) and folds to hero flop c-bets 11/32 times (34%). River aggression shows up in 5/200 hands (3%). Villain has won 82 of 97 showdowns.

nodes.title: Frequent preflop 3-bettor
nodes.body: Villain has 3-bet preflop in 5 completed hands.

nodes.title: Folds to flop c-bets
nodes.body: Villain has folded to hero flop c-bet 11 times across 32 c-bet opportunities.

nodes.title: Folds to river bets
nodes.body: Villain has folded to hero river bets 18 times across 24 river bet opportunities.

nodes.title: River aggressor
nodes.body: Villain has bet or raised the river in 5 completed hands.

nodes.title: Strong showdown caller
nodes.body: Villain has won 82 of 97 showdowns (85%). When villain calls to showdown their range is strong — bluffing at showdown is likely -EV.
